content: W1 Foundation: catalog.schemas.ts + slugify helper + CATALOG_READ/WRITE_ROLES
W2 Backend: catalog-admin module (errors, repo, service, controller) with Brand+Model+Trim+BodyType CRUD, soft-delete, ref-count audit, brand logo S3 presign
W3 Frontend: AdminCatalogAdminService + brands-list/brand-models-list/body-types-list + brand-edit-drawer + routes + sidebar rewire
W4 QA: slugify.spec (10 tests) + catalog-admin.service.spec (15 tests); all suites green; admin build green; api webpack build green
Brands & Models admin module (Sprint 2.6) complete: mockups + 4 waves shipped, 230 tests across 5 projects passing
